title: Caldera - System Network Configuration Discovery (Linux)
description: Detects Linux commands used to enumerate network interface configuration. Caldera T1016 emulation runs ip addr/route/link, ifconfig, route -n, and arp to map network topology and identify active interfaces after initial access.
query: ('Log Source' = 'SOC Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Secure Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Audit Logs') and (((msg like '*ip addr*' or msg like '*ip route*' or msg like '*ip link*' or msg like '*ip neigh*' or msg like '*ip -4 addr*' or msg like '*ip -6 addr*')) or ((msg like '*ifconfig -a*' or msg like '*ifconfig eth*' or msg like '*ifconfig ens*' or msg like '*ifconfig lo*')) or ((msg like '*route -n*' or msg like '*route -e*' or msg like '*netstat -rn*' or msg like '*netstat -r *')) or ((msg like '*arp -a*' or msg like '*arp -n*' or msg like '*cat /proc/net/arp*')))
